name: Spring Valley Acquisition Corp. III
summary: PART I . General We are a blank check company incorporated in the Cayman Islands on March 12, 2025 formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, share purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses or entities, which we refer to as our initial Business Combination.
